rulings.Case Title: MARY LYONS VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Colgate-Palmolive Company's motion for summary adjudication of plaintiff's claim for punitive damages is continued to May 3, 2018 pursuant to Local Rule 2.7(B). The Court received a courtesy copy of plaintiff's opposition not sufficiently in advance of the hearing. = (503/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MARY DEBORAH AVEGGIO ET AL VS. ADVANCE AUTO PARTS, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 2, 2018 in Department 503, Line 2. Detroit Stoker Company, LLC's motion to quash for lack of personal jurisdiction is continued to May 10, 2018 pursuant to Local Rule 2.7(B). Plaintiffs failed to lodge with the Court a courtesy copy of their supplemental opposition and they must do so no later than May 3, 2018. If a hearing is requested to contest this continuance, it will be at 9:30a.m., Hon. Lynn O'Malley-Taylor presiding. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. =(503/LOT)
